interfaces.name: getHomeOverview
interfaces.description: Get overview content for the home page including basic hotel intro, location summary, and key highlights.

interfaces.name: getHomeFeaturedRooms
interfaces.description: Get a small set of featured rooms for display on the home page.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of featured rooms to return.

interfaces.name: getHomeFeaturedOffers
interfaces.description: Get featured offers and spa packages for display on the home page.

parameters.name: types
parameters.description: Optional filter to include only certain offer types such as 'spa_package' or 'room_offer'.

interfaces.name: getNewsletterTeaserContent
interfaces.description: Get teaser content for the newsletter section on the home page.

interfaces.name: getRoomSearchFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get options for the room search widget and filter panel, including view types, amenity filters, price range, and sort options.

defaultCheckInDate.description: ISO date string for suggested check-in.

defaultCheckOutDate.description: ISO date string for suggested check-out.

interfaces.name: searchAvailableRooms
interfaces.description: Search available rooms for given dates, guests, filters, and sort order to populate the Rooms & Suites listing or quick search results.

amenities.description: Optional list of required amenity codes such as 'breakfast_included', 'wifi'.

interfaces.name: getRoomDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific room, including description, amenities, images, and key policies.

interfaces.name: getRoomRates
interfaces.description: Get available rate plans for a room for the selected dates and guest configuration.

interfaces.name: startRoomBooking
interfaces.description: Create a booking record for a selected room and rate plan for the given stay details and move into the booking details flow.

interfaces.name: addRoomToComparison
interfaces.description: Add a room to the current comparison set (up to the maximum number of comparable rooms).

interfaces.name: removeRoomFromComparison
interfaces.description: Remove a room from the current comparison set.

interfaces.name: clearRoomComparison
interfaces.description: Clear all rooms from the current comparison set.

interfaces.name: getRoomComparisonView
interfaces.description: Get the current comparison table view with details for each selected room, including bed type, view, amenities, and price per night for optional dates.

parameters.name: checkInDate
parameters.description: Optional ISO check-in date; if omitted, basePricePerNight is used.

parameters.name: adults
parameters.description: Optional number of adults for pricing.

parameters.name: children
parameters.description: Optional number of children for pricing.

interfaces.name: getBookingDetails
interfaces.description: Get booking details for display on the booking details page, including selected room or package, stay dates, guests, and price breakdown.

interfaces.name: updateBookingGuestDetails
interfaces.description: Update guest details for a booking from the booking details form.

parameters.name: arrivalTime
parameters.description: Optional estimated arrival time in 'HH:MM' 24h format.

interfaces.name: proceedBookingToPayment
interfaces.description: Move a booking from the details step to the payment step, updating status to 'pending_payment'.

interfaces.name: getBookingPaymentSummary
interfaces.description: Get a payment summary for a room or package booking to display on the checkout & payment page.

interfaces.name: processBookingPayment
interfaces.description: Process payment for a booking and update booking status upon success.

interfaces.name: getCartCheckoutSummary
interfaces.description: Get checkout summary for the current cart (gift cards) including line items, totals, and taxes.

interfaces.name: processCartPayment
interfaces.description: Process payment for the current cart (gift card purchases) and clear the cart upon success.

interfaces.name: getRestaurantOverview
interfaces.description: Get overview content for the restaurant & bar, including concept, atmosphere, hours, and sample dishes.

interfaces.name: getRestaurantReservationConfig
interfaces.description: Get configuration data for the restaurant reservation form, including seating areas, table location preferences, and party size limits.

interfaces.name: getRestaurantAvailableTimeSlots
interfaces.description: Get available restaurant reservation time slots for a given date, party size, seating area, and optional time window.

parameters.name: reservationDate
parameters.description: ISO date string for the reservation.

interfaces.name: createRestaurantReservation
interfaces.description: Create a restaurant reservation for a selected time slot, party size, seating preference, and contact details.

interfaces.name: getMenuFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the menus & dinner planner page, including meal types and dietary preferences.

interfaces.name: getMenuItems
interfaces.description: Get menu items for a given meal type and optional filters, organized for display by course and dietary tags.

interfaces.name: addMenuItemToDinnerPlan
interfaces.description: Add a menu item to the current dinner plan selection list.

interfaces.name: getCurrentDinnerPlan
interfaces.description: Get the current dinner plan with selected menu items and total price.

interfaces.name: saveDinnerPlan
interfaces.description: Save the current dinner plan for future reference, optionally giving it a name and notes.

interfaces.name: getOfferFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the offers & packages listing page, including spa access and late checkout filters.

interfaces.name: searchOffers
interfaces.description: Search offers and packages with filters for spa access, late checkout, price, and sort order.

interfaces.name: getOfferDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a selected offer or package, including inclusions, spa benefits, and images.

interfaces.name: getOfferAvailability
interfaces.description: Get eligible rooms and indicative pricing for a specific offer or package for the selected dates and guests.

interfaces.name: startOfferBooking
interfaces.description: Create a booking for a selected offer and room for the given stay details and move into the booking details flow.

interfaces.name: getGiftCardTypes
interfaces.description: Get available gift card types (e.g., restaurant-only, hotel credit) for the gift cards page.

interfaces.name: addGiftCardToCart
interfaces.description: Configure a gift card purchase and add it to the internal cart, creating the cart if necessary.

parameters.name: sendDate
parameters.description: Optional scheduled send date as ISO date string.

interfaces.name: getCartSummary
interfaces.description: Get the current cart contents for the cart page, including gift card items and totals.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of a given cart item.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove a cart item from the current cart.

interfaces.name: getMeetingsOverview
interfaces.description: Get overview content for the meetings & events page, including spaces, capacities, and highlight amenities.

interfaces.name: getMeetingAmenityOptions
interfaces.description: Get available meeting and event amenity options for the inquiry form checklist.

interfaces.name: submitMeetingEventInquiry
interfaces.description: Submit a meeting or event inquiry with event details, attendee count, amenities, and contact information.

parameters.name: amenities
parameters.description: Array of MeetingAmenity.code values such as 'projector', 'screen', 'coffee_break', 'wifi'.

interfaces.name: createNewsletterSubscription
interfaces.description: Create a newsletter subscription with selected interest preferences and email frequency.

parameters.name: consentMarketing
parameters.description: Indicates consent to receive marketing emails.

interfaces.name: getAboutHotelContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About the Hotel page, including history, design concept, location, and contact information.

interfaces.name: getPrivacyPolicyContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the privacy policy page, including sections on data use, cookies, retention, and user rights.

interfaces.name: getTermsAndConditionsContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the terms & conditions page, optionally scoped by context such as rooms, restaurant, or gift cards.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get the current cart or create a new one in internal state.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateDinnerPlan
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or initialize the current dinner plan selection for the user.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateRoomComparison
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or initialize the current room comparison set.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateStayNightsAndPriceBreakdown
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute the number of nights and nightly price breakdown for a room, rate plan, or offer.

helperFunctions.name: _findCheapestRatePlanForRoomAndDates
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to select the cheapest active rate plan for a room over specified dates.

helperFunctions.name: _getEarliestAvailableTimeSlot
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to choose the earliest available restaurant time slot within a given time range.
